programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: En 1840, Turner a peint le chef-dœuvre "Nuages et leau". Charlotte tente de comprendre son style libre, avec des taches epaisses. LAnglais et violoncelliste Dominic Seldis vient faire resonner son violoncelle pour vanter les merites de ce "Rembrandt britannique". Michel decouvre que le tableau a subi un traitement precaire, mais se demande comment. En quete de reponses, lequipe se rend à la Tate Britain puis sur une falaise anglaise venteuse. Un episode dans lequel un fer à repasser, un rocher de craie à Margate et un pot de cire dabeille jouent un rôle preponderant.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the retrospective "Tutto Ponti" which retraces 60 years of the career of the architect-designer Gio Ponti at the decorative arts museum. This is the first retrospective devoted to this Italian artist. You will discover his ceramic works from the beginning of his career, but also the furniture designs anchored in his poetic and subtle universe.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: In 1050, one of the first major pilgrimage churches in the Western world was built at Conques, in the middle of the wild Aveyron landscape. This was the birth of "Romanesque" architecture. The abbey church - i.e., a church belonging to an abbey - at Conques is one of the most important structures built in 11th-century France. Its coherence, its location - a small village in the Rouergue region, far from the main medieval traffic routes - its innovative aspect, its state of preservation and the fact that the relics for which it was built are still in situ, make the church at Conques the best work of art for approaching Romanesque architecture in France. In other words, to try and understand how architecture was made at that time in our history, and to dismantle not only the building itself, but also a number of preconceived ideas about Romanesque art, starting with its very name, which is an intellectual construct of the 19th century, or to put it another way: those who built Conques.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pour les 500 ans de la mort de Raphaël, une grande exposition a ouvert ses portes à Rome. « Exhibition on Screen » a eu un accès exclusif à cet evenement, qui reunit plus de 200 œuvres majeures de ce maître de la Renaissance. Le film part à la decouverte de l’exposition et eclaire d’une nouvelle lumière le travail de cet artiste souvent incompris ou, au contraire, idealise.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musee d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Jady Bates is an internationally known photographer, exhibited at Soho Photo Gallery in New York. She is known for her "darkroom photographer" series, which depicts naked women in black and white with words and/or phrases written on them. She is also the photographer of the band THE SLANTS.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Slam, a portrait photographer. He lives between Paris and New-York, and he is a photographer specialized in beauty, music, fashion, he makes portraits sometimes provocative. He will tell us about his life, his career, and how he became a photographer.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux stars des annees 70, le crooner cool Tony Christie et la royaute pop Jimmy Osmond, sont accompagnes des experts Catherine Southon et Margie Cooper. Partant de la ville de Loughborough, dans le Leicestershire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stoke-on-Trent, dans le Staffordshire.Tony profite dune visite à Coalbrookdale, le lieu où des techniques innovantes ont ete developpees, marquant le debut de la revolution industrielle. De son côte, le passionne de voitures Jimmy soffre un tour sur le circuit historique de Donington.La grande finale aux enchères comprend un moment de chant en groupe unique en son genre. Mais quel maestro musical remportera la victoire ?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Yan Gongda - The Art of Calligraphy
programme.desc: While the hieroglyphs of Egypt and the cuneiform of Babylon have disappeared, Chinese calligraphy, also graphic and non-alphabetic, has endured through the ages. Of divinatory origin, Chinese characters carry not only a language but a unique way of thinking. A 84th-generation descendant of one of Confucius’s best-known disciples, calligrapher Yan Gongda unrolls before our camera the timeless story of a writing art closer to painting than graphology. Through this story, the entire history of China is told.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: L’aube du pop art - Dans l’œil de Fernand Leger
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinerante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournee au musee Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’eternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son sejour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à decouvrir les nombreuses enigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son createur mysterieux - Vermeer. Qui etait cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour decouvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musee de La Haye et repondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Hôtel de Crillon - The Renaissance of a Paris landmark
programme.desc: At the bottom of the Champs-Élysees is one of the most luxurious hotels in the world: the Hôtel de Crillon. After lavish refurbishment, this 300-year old monument recently received "Palace" status.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Caspar David Friedrich (1774-1840) est un peintre romantique allemand qui s’est surtout concentre sur l’art du paysage, qu’il traite avec une touche minutieuse. Il a ete redecouvert à la fin du XIXe s. De caractère melancolique, il a peuple ses toiles de figures humaines de dos, contemplant l’immensite de la nature, comme son très celèbre Voyageur au-dessus de la mer de nuages de Hambourg ou ses Falaises de craie à Rugen. Observez ses superbes paysages aux tons crepusculaires.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Leonardo da Vinci.You will discover his labour with the Joconde, Salvator Mundi, The Cène.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherlands painter, Rembrandt.You will discover his labour with The night round, the return of the prodigal son, Danae.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part II
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until youre 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Have you ever hiked with all five senses? Join us on a journey from the bustling metropolis of Tokyo to the serene Okutama forest to meet Dr. Kagawa, the pioneering scientist who first validated the health benefits of nature immersion. Together, we engage in Shinrin Yoku, commonly known as forest bathing, a sensory-rich experience that invites us to use all five senses as we explore the wooded landscape. This episode reveals that forest bathing is far more than just a nature hike; its a practice of mindfulness that fully immerses us in the present moment through sight, sound, smell, touch, and taste. Learn how this deeply rooted Japanese tradition offers both physical and psychological benefits, opening your mind and tuning your senses to the therapeutic powers of nature. Join us on this eye-opening expedition and discover how you, too, can improve your well-being through the simple yet transformative act of forest bathing.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week it’s the last of the heats and sees a pair of new kids on the block taking on a more experienced and established pair of garden designers. For Millie Souter from London and Max Parker-Smith from Surrey it’s a huge challenge as both of them have only recently graduated in garden design from the prestigious Inchbald Garden Design College so have limited experience of actually creating gardens. Making things even tougher, it’s also the first time the friends have worked together. Opposing them is Nicola Bailey Gibson and Viv Seccombe who bring years of experience designing and building private gardens and award-winning show gardens. The challenge our pairs face is to create amazing gardens for Focus Birmingham Day Care Centre which offers activities and support to people with severe visual and physical disabilities. And they have to do this is just 2 days and on a budget of £5000.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: After witnessing agricultural practices in far-flung places like Bhutan and Okinawa, host Mike dives into the world of sustainable gardening right in his own backyard. With the guidance of a local soil scientist, we follow Mikes hands-on journey into the art and science of farming sustainably. From planting the first seeds to navigating unexpected challenges, this episode offers a candid look at the highs and lows of gardening for sustainability. Beyond the physical labor and the harvest, we also explore the emotional and mental rewards of this earthy endeavor. Mike learns that the act of growing your own food is not just a means to an end—its a therapeutic practice that nurtures the mind as well as the body. Tune in to see how the simple act of cultivating a garden can yield abundant lessons in sustainability, health, and well-being.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Soften the Edges: Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Soften the Edges is a sequence that encourages a sense of ease in both body and breath while moving through a dynamic series of confident poses. Tap into a quality of inner peace and learn toreturn to that feeling whenever you are most challenged, on and off the mat.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina vous propose une seance explosive de cardio boxing. Après un echauffement complet des articulations, la team vous guide dans des enchaînements rythmes inspires des sports de combat. C’est l’occasion ideale de travailler l’endurance, la coordination et la sangle abdominale tout en se defoulant. L’energie est au rendez-vous, et l’ambiance fun rend l’effort encore plus motivant. Parfait pour relâcher la pression et faire le plein de vitalite !

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Bhakti Flow: Open Your Upper Back and Shoulders
programme.desc: Bhakti Flow invite à une expansion de tout votre etre grâce à la pratique du bhakti, la devotion. Cet enchaînement allie equilibre et force, tout en attirant l’attention sur les zones du corps où la tension se dissimule, souvent ignorees. Apprenez à donner de l’espace à votre respiration et laissez-vous porter par le deroulement de la sequence.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training special haut du corps. Après un echauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, epaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. Le tout dans une ambiance fun et accessible, avec des conseils pour bien respirer et bouger sans se blesser. La coordination et la mobilite sont aussi au cœur de cette seance, ideale pour reveiller le haut du corps. Un moment sportif et motivant à vivre chez soi, à tout moment de la journee.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Soften the Edges: Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Soften the Edges is a sequence that encourages a sense of ease in both body and breath while moving through a dynamic series of confident poses. Tap into a quality of inner peace and learn toreturn to that feeling whenever you are most challenged, on and off the mat.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Cest parti pour cette nouvelle semaine de competition. Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de marteaux, les quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles, dans latelier. C’est loccasion de jauger la concurrence. La première pretendante au titre d’As de la Deco, cest Adeline. Du haut de ses 26 ans, la jeune femme est gerante dune boutique de vetements en ligne. La mode et les tendances, cest son dada... ce qui fait d’elle une concurrente redoutable !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce deuxième jour de competition, cest au tour de Michaella, 46 ans, dentrer dans larène. Derrière son sourire dange se cache une adversaire redoutable. Son metier de gerante dune societe dimpression digitale est latout majeur de son projet.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec linterprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont preparer deux recettes 100% vegetariennes, philosophie adoptee par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillees, haricots blancs au pesto et burger vegetarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se regaler avec des plats vegetariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Mediterranee, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la puree davocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des legumes printaniers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina vous propose une seance full body accessible et motivante. L’echauffement guide par Guigui prepare chaque articulation : chevilles, genoux, hanches, epaules, nuque. Ensuite, place à une serie d’exercices progressifs pour activer tout le corps sans pression. L’ambiance est chaleureuse, les consignes sont claires, et chacun peut avancer à son rythme. Parfait pour reveiller le corps et booster l’energie, meme dans son salon !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balanced Being: Open Your Hips and Strengthen Your Arms and Upper Back
programme.desc: Balanced Being is a powerful, flowing sequence that creates presence and strength. Use this practice to root down, then rise up with confidence and a centered, balanced energy. A study of complimentary opposites, this practice will challenge you to find the balance within the opposition.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Severine Ferrer, animatrice et comedienne, pour preparer des tartes. Au menu : le gâteau patate (specialite reunionnaise avec de la patate douce) et une tarte "Luarraine

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cette episode, Luana Belmondo reçoit son amie Suzie Palatin pour preparer de la cuisine antillaise. Au menu : colombo de poulet, en en dessert, un blanc-manger au coco.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Ces reportages sont surtout loccasion pour Yann Arthus-Bertrand de dresser un etat des lieux de la planète et de denoncer certains comportements humains, à lorigine de degradations environnementales et climatiques dramatiques, voire irreversibles. Direction Tokyo puis le Kenya vers un refuge animalier. Puis vers le mont Fuji pour apprendre à y vivre ainsi que de tout le plastique qui encombre les mers. Les reportages aborderont des produits du quotidien, choisis pour leurs pratiques de production destructrices à la fois pour les hommes et pour lenvironnement.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: This powerful episode follows a group of Canadian students—many from small, rural communities—as they embark on their first journey outside the country. Cambodia becomes their living classroom, offering lessons rarely found in textbooks.Together, we explore temples, farms, and cultural sites, witnessing their evolving perspectives as they encounter new customs, foods, and ways of life. At Angkor Wat, students learn how history, spirituality, and mindfulness have shaped Cambodian culture for centuries.The transformations are immediate and profound. Students reflect on global inequality, cultural resilience, and what it means to see the world through new eyes. This episode is a celebration of experiential education and the life-changing impact of travel on young minds.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In Scotland, we investigate whether lifestyle, passions, and even abilities can be influenced by ancestral culture. We begin by training with one of the greatest Highland Games athletes of all time, learning traditional events like the caber toss and stone lift—sports rooted deeply in Scottish heritage.We then visit a weaving workshop to create a custom family tartan, connecting lineage and identity through colour and pattern. At the historic grounds of St. Andrews Golf Course, we explore the origins of golf and its cultural significance.The episode ends with a climb on the Balmoral Estate to Prince Albert’s Cairn, a stunning monument overlooking the Scottish Highlands. Here, we reflect on whether heritage shapes more than identity—perhaps even the activities, environments, and traditions we feel drawn to.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: "The end of oil" is the amazing story of a raw material which has revolutionized mans life in just a century. But today, oil reserves are depleting. In his crazy race for always more production, Man didnt manage to preserve this precious energy that took million years for the Earth to give out. To tell the adventure of oil, Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team went to the United States, the country which depends the most on black gold. At the start of the 21st century, it is now urgent to realize that oil resources are limited. Its today that we have to act and get organized, in order to prepare the new era to come. While all our economies are based on the petrol barrels price, well have to learn to do without oil within 20, 30 or 100 years. What will be the consequences? What are the solutions at stake? This new episode of Earth From Above attempts to answer these questions. From China to Benin, including Azerbaijan, Belgium and Canada, Earth From Above takes us on a new trip.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part II
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until youre 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Have you ever hiked with all five senses? Join us on a journey from the bustling metropolis of Tokyo to the serene Okutama forest to meet Dr. Kagawa, the pioneering scientist who first validated the health benefits of nature immersion. Together, we engage in Shinrin Yoku, commonly known as forest bathing, a sensory-rich experience that invites us to use all five senses as we explore the wooded landscape. This episode reveals that forest bathing is far more than just a nature hike; its a practice of mindfulness that fully immerses us in the present moment through sight, sound, smell, touch, and taste. Learn how this deeply rooted Japanese tradition offers both physical and psychological benefits, opening your mind and tuning your senses to the therapeutic powers of nature. Join us on this eye-opening expedition and discover how you, too, can improve your well-being through the simple yet transformative act of forest bathing.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: After witnessing agricultural practices in far-flung places like Bhutan and Okinawa, host Mike dives into the world of sustainable gardening right in his own backyard. With the guidance of a local soil scientist, we follow Mikes hands-on journey into the art and science of farming sustainably. From planting the first seeds to navigating unexpected challenges, this episode offers a candid look at the highs and lows of gardening for sustainability. Beyond the physical labor and the harvest, we also explore the emotional and mental rewards of this earthy endeavor. Mike learns that the act of growing your own food is not just a means to an end—its a therapeutic practice that nurtures the mind as well as the body. Tune in to see how the simple act of cultivating a garden can yield abundant lessons in sustainability, health, and well-being.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous plonge dans une seance fitness à l’ancienne, fun et dynamique. On commence par un echauffement complet : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne… tout y passe pour preparer le corps. Ensuite, place à une serie de mouvements inspires du fitness retro, rythmes par la musique et la bonne humeur. La coordination et le cardio sont au rendez-vous, avec une ambiance conviviale et des blagues pour garder le sourire. Un super moment à partager en famille ou entre amis, pour bouger sans pression.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Open and Ground: Stretch Your Shoulders and Strengthen Your Upper Back
programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet episode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina vous propose une seance full body accessible et motivante. L’echauffement guide par Guigui prepare chaque articulation : chevilles, genoux, hanches, epaules, nuque. Ensuite, place à une serie d’exercices progressifs pour activer tout le corps sans pression. L’ambiance est chaleureuse, les consignes sont claires, et chacun peut avancer à son rythme. Parfait pour reveiller le corps et booster l’energie, meme dans son salon !

programme.title: Yoga

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce troisième jour de competition, cest Vincent qui va donner de la voix. À 38 ans, ce Namurois au look soigne de la tete aux pieds travaille comme directeur artistique dans une agence de publicite. La creativite et les tendances, ça le connaît ! Vincent est un amateur de decoration minimaliste et quand il redecore, il a sa propre technique.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Pour ce quatrième jour de competition, cest Monica, la jolie Parisienne, qui entre en scène. Mais derrière ses airs de citadine, à 52 ans, elle est une adversaire redoutable, avec de nombreux atouts en poche. La decoration, cest une veritable passion pour notre doyenne de la semaine.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Lheure du verdict est enfin arrivee. Les quatre chantiers sont termines et les candidats vont faire face aux critiques de leurs adversaires. Mais surtout, les proprietaires vont rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que penseront-ils de leur nouvel interieur ? Quelles notes vont-ils attribuer ? Ultime espoir pour tenter de remporter la competition : etre le coup de cœur de Valerie Damidot, notre experte, et obtenir son point bonus. Qui repartira avec les 2000 € et le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cap au Nord pour decouvrir une ville française absolument incontournable : Lille. Cette ville possède un patrimoine architectural exceptionnel, marchande dès le Moyen Age, citadelle sous Louis XIV, industrielle au XIXe...elle sagrandit au cours des siècles. Julie ira à la rencontre de ceux qui participent à la renommee de la ville et de la region, et à travers son patrimoine culinaire avec au menu de ce voyage : la recette du coq à la bière, celle du hochepot, et sur une note sucree, une crème brûlee à la chicoree. .

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, le potiron est à lhonneur. Luana Belmondo cuisine un veloute de potiron aux epices avec des sables sales au parmesan. Et pour la suite, elle prepare des gnocchis de potiron avec une sauce au fromage onctueuse.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo invite son amie Eleonora Galasso pour une pizza party ! Elles vont dabord preparer une pâte maison. Ensuite, elles cuisineront une capriciosa avec des anchois, des câpres et du jambon, ainsi quune pizza fritta avec de l’origan et de la sauce tomate.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: A land of character, Corrèze is full of hidden treasures. From Collonges-la-Rouge, a flamboyant red sandstone town, to the Cistercian abbey of Aubazine, and through Beaulieu-sur-Dordogne and its medieval heritage, each place bears witness to a rich past. But beyond its monuments, this region is also seductive for its untouched nature and its passionate inhabitants, guardians of an age-old legacy.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Haut-RhinWelcome to Alsace, a land of tradition endowed with a heritage of incredible beauty! In the Haut-Rhin, we visit the mediaeval town of Riquewihr, whose wine is exported throughout the world, and Éguisheim, a veritable picture postcard village. Finally, we take a stroll through Colmar, the little Venice of Alsace.Directed by: Nicolas Coutand (season 1, France, 2014).

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Fra gibbonaper, makaker, grønne havskilpadder og orientalske kloløse dvergotere til kragebjørner, siamkrokodiller og asiagapenebb. Vi møter de bemerkelsesverdige dyrene som har tilpasset seg et liv i de unikt tøffe forholdene og ekstreme klimaene i det sørlige Vietnams tropiske habitater.

programme.title: Ville Hawaii
programme.desc: Utforsk Hawaiis flammende hjerte. Fra vulkanske utbrudd som skaper elver av flytende lava til edderkopper som smiler, fisk som klatrer og skilpadder som graver ned hemmeligheter i et landskap som overgår forventningene. Lær mer om en av jordens mest aktive vulkaner Kilauea, som betyr «å spy». Og vi ser hvordan Hawaiis dyr har utviklet seg i en annen retning enn slektninger i resten av verden.

programme.title: Ville Hawaii
programme.desc: Der hvor kysten slutter, begynner historien. Dra til ville og våte Hawaii, med undersjøiske elver og dyr som bare lever der. Se kjempemanta fly gjennom havet, knølhval som kjemper til døden og tigerhai som forbløffer oss med sin råhet. Hawaii ligger midt i den nordre Stillehavsstrømmen. Alt slags liv blir dratt med inn i denne undersjøiske elven og dratt med til Hawaii.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en storslått reise til et av verdens villeste og farligste landskaper: det sub-tropiske skogsområdet i Afrika. Her finnes noen av kontinentets mest velkjente kjemper. En antikk verden med ekstreme forhold som danner bakteppe for kampene mellom rovdyr og byttedyr.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Fra gibbonaper, makaker, grønne havskilpadder og orientalske kloløse dvergotere til kragebjørner, siamkrokodiller og asiagapenebb. Vi møter de bemerkelsesverdige dyrene som har tilpasset seg et liv i de unikt tøffe forholdene og ekstreme klimaene i det sørlige Vietnams tropiske habitater.

programme.title: Ville Hawaii
programme.desc: Utforsk Hawaiis flammende hjerte. Fra vulkanske utbrudd som skaper elver av flytende lava til edderkopper som smiler, fisk som klatrer og skilpadder som graver ned hemmeligheter i et landskap som overgår forventningene. Lær mer om en av jordens mest aktive vulkaner Kilauea, som betyr «å spy». Og vi ser hvordan Hawaiis dyr har utviklet seg i en annen retning enn slektninger i resten av verden.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: National Geographics Bertie Gregory ser på bienes fantastiske verden og de utrolige hemmelighetene bak suksessen deres. Fra murerbienes geniale arkitektur til kjøttetende bier i Amazonasregnskogen, de utrolige evnene deres blir avdekket sammen med ny kunnskap om bienes intelligens. Gjennom en honningbies liv følger vi livet i den travle bikuben når søstrene hennes kjemper for å overleve vinteren.

programme.title: Præriehundenes rike
programme.desc: Det er vinter i New Mexico. I Highlands forbereder Carl og ungene seg på å gå i hi, men en uvanlig allianse mellom noen farlige rovdyr har skapt en stor trussel for præriehundene.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: En spekkhoggerfamilies suksess er avhengig av erfaringen til deres 60 år gamle matriark, mens en førstegangs bjørnemor må oppdra sine tre unger alene.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Dykk under overflaten til jordens endeløse hav for å avsløre en verden med ytterligheter – fra overveldende dyp til stormfullt kystlandskap og overfylte korallrev. Hav er dynamiske miljøer der dyrene må tilpasse seg et liv som er i konstant endring. Oppdag hvordan seler unngår haier, hvordan skilpadder risikerer livene sine for å skape sin neste generasjon og hvordan snarrådige spekkhoggere kjemper for å overleve ansikt til ansikt med konkurransen.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: National Geographics Bertie Gregory ser på bienes fantastiske verden og de utrolige hemmelighetene bak suksessen deres. Fra murerbienes geniale arkitektur til kjøttetende bier i Amazonasregnskogen, de utrolige evnene deres blir avdekket sammen med ny kunnskap om bienes intelligens. Gjennom en honningbies liv følger vi livet i den travle bikuben når søstrene hennes kjemper for å overleve vinteren.

programme.desc: En spekkhoggerfamilies suksess er avhengig av erfaringen til deres 60 år gamle matriark, mens en førstegangs bjørnemor må oppdra sine tre unger alene.

Hav er dynamiske miljøer der dyrene må tilpasse seg et liv som er i konstant endring. Oppdag hvordan seler unngår haier, hvordan skilpadder risikerer livene sine for å skape sin neste generasjon og hvordan snarrådige spekkhoggere kjemper for å overleve ansikt til ansikt med konkurransen.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Polene, som er jordens kaldeste habitater, er hjem til dyrerikets ultimate overlevere.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: I denne episoden hjelper dr. Pol en merr som har satt noe i halsen, dr. Brenda ser til en halt ku og dr. Lisa behandler en okse. På klinikken tar man imot flere hunder: en chihuahua som har brukket beinet, en drektig tispe og en dobermann med kuler i ansiktet. Men uansett hva det gjelder, så stiller veterinærene alltid opp.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: I dag er klinikken travlere enn noensinne når Dr. Pol og teamet må håndtere flere hastesaker etter hverandre. Dyrlegene lapper sammen en skadet hund, ser til kosete chinchillaer, hjelper en svært oppblåst okse og fikser smerter i noens bak.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Det er fullt kaos hos Pol Vet! Dyrlegen assisterer en ung hoppe som føder og dr. Lisa behandler en grand danois med et hovent ansikt. Geiter med koksidiose kjemper for livet og en løskatt vil ikke behandles. En katt er full av luft, en gris har mistet hengemagen. En svart labrador har et illeluktende problem. Bråkete angus-kveg får svangerskapskontroller og vinteren kommer til Michigan.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: Kongoskogen i Sentral-Afrika er hjemsted for et hemmelighetsfullt dyr vi fortsatt vet svært lite om. Dvergsjimpanser er en av våre nærmeste slektninger, men i samfunnet deres er det kvinner som styrer. En ung dvergsjimpanse må forlate familien sin for å finne sin plass i verden. Her er vennskap nøkkelen til å overleve. Hun må få nye venner og imponere alfahunnen før hun virkelig kan passe inn.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: Den etiopiske fjellverdenen styres av to vidt forskjellige dronninger, men begge mødrene oppdrar døtre. En gelada-ape styrer et tett sammensveiset søsterskap, men med sin eneste datter på vei til voksen alder må hun ofre stort for fremtiden. På platået over har også en etiopisk ulv en datter, men denne moren må være hensynsløs for å beskytte sin egen arv.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: En spekkhoggerfamilies suksess er avhengig av erfaringen til deres 60 år gamle matriark, mens en førstegangs bjørnemor må oppdra sine tre unger alene.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: I hjertet av Tanzania danner de ruvende veggene til Ngorongoro-krateret en scene for en av de mest beryktede rivaliseringene i naturen. Søstrene til en formidabel løveflokk kolliderer med en hyeneklan styrt av en allmektig dronning. Søsterskapet deler ansvaret, mens hyenedronningen må spille klanpolitikk og håndheve et strengt hierarki for å beholde kronen.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: Den afrikanske savannen er hjemmet til det ultimate dyresøsterskapet - en elefantfamilie. En ny baby vil trenge familiens støtte for å komme seg gjennom sine tidlige sårbare måneder. Mens moren lærer å ta vare på henne, er det babyens bestemor, matriarken, som må beskytte henne. Kan denne nye babyen og hennes familie av ikoniske hunner overleve i møte med rovdyr, tørke og en verden i rask endring?

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Ulvene er kanskje det fremste eksempelet på dyr som jakter sammen, basert på hierarkiet og lojaliteten i flokken.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Under jakten er slangene mestere til å vurdere det nøyaktige øyeblikket som betyr forskjellen på liv og død.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Trass i det forhistoriske utseendet er reptilene sofistikerte dyr som er fulle av overraskelser. Og som dinosaurene, er reptilene dyktige jegere.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Ulvene er kanskje det fremste eksempelet på dyr som jakter sammen, basert på hierarkiet og lojaliteten i flokken.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: I denne episoden hjelper dr. Pol en merr som har satt noe i halsen, dr. Brenda ser til en halt ku og dr. Lisa behandler en okse. På klinikken tar man imot flere hunder: en chihuahua som har brukket beinet, en drektig tispe og en dobermann med kuler i ansiktet. Men uansett hva det gjelder, så stiller veterinærene alltid opp.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: I dag er klinikken travlere enn noensinne når Dr. Pol og teamet må håndtere flere hastesaker etter hverandre. Dyrlegene lapper sammen en skadet hund, ser til kosete chinchillaer, hjelper en svært oppblåst okse og fikser smerter i noens bak.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Det er fullt kaos hos Pol Vet! Dyrlegen assisterer en ung hoppe som føder og dr. Lisa behandler en grand danois med et hovent ansikt. Geiter med koksidiose kjemper for livet og en løskatt vil ikke behandles. En katt er full av luft, en gris har mistet hengemagen. En svart labrador har et illeluktende problem. Bråkete angus-kveg får svangerskapskontroller og vinteren kommer til Michigan.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Ulvene er kanskje det fremste eksempelet på dyr som jakter sammen, basert på hierarkiet og lojaliteten i flokken.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: En spekkhoggerfamilies suksess er avhengig av erfaringen til deres 60 år gamle matriark, mens en førstegangs bjørnemor må oppdra sine tre unger alene.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Dykk under overflaten til jordens endeløse hav for å avsløre en verden med ytterligheter – fra overveldende dyp til stormfullt kystlandskap og overfylte korallrev. Hav er dynamiske miljøer der dyrene må tilpasse seg et liv som er i konstant endring. Oppdag hvordan seler unngår haier, hvordan skilpadder risikerer livene sine for å skape sin neste generasjon og hvordan snarrådige spekkhoggere kjemper for å overleve ansikt til ansikt med konkurransen.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: I hjertet av Tanzania danner de ruvende veggene til Ngorongoro-krateret en scene for en av de mest beryktede rivaliseringene i naturen. Søstrene til en formidabel løveflokk kolliderer med en hyeneklan styrt av en allmektig dronning. programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: Den afrikanske savannen er hjemmet til det ultimate dyresøsterskapet - en elefantfamilie. En ny baby vil trenge familiens støtte for å komme seg gjennom sine tidlige sårbare måneder. Mens moren lærer å ta vare på henne, er det babyens bestemor, matriarken, som må beskytte henne. Kan denne nye babyen og hennes familie av ikoniske hunner overleve i møte med rovdyr, tørke og en verden i rask endring?

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: Enten de skal unnslippe farlige rovdyr eller bekjempe tøffe rivaler, så er ikke alltid rå styrke nok til å lykkes. Vi møter noen av planetens mest unike dyr som tar i bruk utrolige superkrefter, som akrobatikk som trosser døden, hemmelige sanser og skjulte våpen, for å overleve.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: National Geographic blir med på en spennende reise over 445 kilometer for å utforske Grand Canyon og dens mysterier.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Naturreservatet Papahanaumokuakea strekker seg over de nordvestre øyene til Hawaii.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Hun beseiret lederen for klanen i nord og har kjempet seg frem som matriark. Nå er hun både en hensynsløs kommandør, som leder flokken i strid med rivaliserende løver, og en omsorgsfull vokter for klanen og ungene.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Under jakten er slangene mestere til å vurdere det nøyaktige øyeblikket som betyr forskjellen på liv og død.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Hun beseiret lederen for klanen i nord og har kjempet seg frem som matriark. Nå er hun både en hensynsløs kommandør, som leder flokken i strid med rivaliserende løver, og en omsorgsfull vokter for klanen og ungene.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Under jakten er slangene mestere til å vurdere det nøyaktige øyeblikket som betyr forskjellen på liv og død.

programme.title: Ville jegere
programme.desc: Trass i det forhistoriske utseendet er reptilene sofistikerte dyr som er fulle av overraskelser. Og som dinosaurene, er reptilene dyktige jegere.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Etter knall og fall redder dr. Pol og veterinærene alt fra gekkoer til geiter på klinikken. En gris med prolaps, en haug med valper og en kommende veterinær holder hjulene i gang. Dr. Pol behandler en dachs som har vært i slåsskamp, dr. Lisa bistår en geit med fødselen og dr. Nicole fjerner spikeren i hoven til en hest. Så får Pol-familien gledelige babynyheter.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dyrlegene ved PVS tar seg av en rekke sommersår, fra en marsvin med en abscess til et reinsdyr med en uvanlig skorpe. En schæfer med alvorlige flenger og en valp med en øyeskade trenger dr. Nicoles ekspertise. Dr. Pol tar seg av en nedfor ku og en katt som ble påkjørt av en bil. Ti søte valper får kontrollert helsa og en minihest trenger øyeblikkelig hjelp.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: I denne episoden hjelper dr. Pol en merr som har satt noe i halsen, dr. Brenda ser til en halt ku og dr. Lisa behandler en okse. På klinikken tar man imot flere hunder: en chihuahua som har brukket beinet, en drektig tispe og en dobermann med kuler i ansiktet. Men uansett hva det gjelder, så stiller veterinærene alltid opp.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Etter å ha mistet moren og søsteren som ettåring lærte han seg å jakte alene, men nå stilles han overfor sine utspekulerte slektninger. Han har klart seg lenge trass i alle utfordringene, og han viser at han ikke lenger er noen einstøing.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Hun er leder for den formidable Trompettre-flokken, en gjeng bøffeldrepende jegere. Til migrasjonen krysser hovedområdet deres og de demonstrerer at de kan tilpasse seg og finner et nytt byttedyr. Men flokken blir kompromittert når en gruppe drar fra dem, så nå må hun og flokken lykkes som mødre.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Hun beseiret lederen for klanen i nord og har kjempet seg frem som matriark. Nå er hun både en hensynsløs kommandør, som leder flokken i strid med rivaliserende løver, og en omsorgsfull vokter for klanen og ungene.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Med et oransje blikk som kjennetegn, er hun leder for en flokk med fem løvinner og de seks ungene deres. De overvinner hver eneste utfordring som en enhet: bøffeljakten eller omveltningene med nye hanner som enten kan redusere flokken eller endelig gi henne en sjanse til å bli mor.

programme.title: Predator Bloodlines
programme.desc: Det er et imponerende syn å se dem vandre over Mara. Disse hannene forbedrer sjansen til å overleve mot de større superpredatorene på savannen, løver og hyener, og tiltrekker seg de flekkete hunnene som også holder til på slettene.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin drar til den australske savannen på jakt etter landets mest formidable skapninger. Først møter han Australias største rovfugl, en kilehaleørn, og Australias mest aggressive slange, kysttaipanen. Senere står han ansikt til ansikt med en krageagam og dens fascinerende forsvarsmekanismer.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslærer Phil Breslin setter kursen mot konstant hete, luftfuktighet og regn i Australias regnskoger for å finne ut hva som kreves for å overleve. I tretoppene finner Phil de sky trekenguruene og babyene deres samt Australias største slange, den dødelige ametystpytonen. På bakken fungerer de fargerike kasuarene som regnskogens gartnere.

programme.title: Crocodile - Australias Greatest Survivor
programme.desc: Verdens største nåværende reptiler, Australias saltvannskrokodiller er eksperter i tålmodighet, kraft og overlevelse. I århundrer har menneskets aktiviteter – som jakt og befolkningsvekst – presset disse “sjefskrokodillene” til nær utryddelse. Vi avslører hvordan, mot alle odds, disse ekstraordinære skapningene fortsetter å eksistere.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslæreren Phil Breslin er i ørkenen i Channel Country, og søker i den endeløse sanden for å finne tre dyr som ikke bare overlever heten, men trives under ubønnhørlige forhold. Gjør deg klar til å møte Australias mes imponerende dyr: kjempevaranen, kontinentets største øgle, emuen, den raskeste flygeudyktige fuglen, og den mektige røde kjempekenguruen, verdens største pungdyr.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslærer Phil Breslin går langs klippene og sandslettene på den australske kysten for å finne ut hvilke dyr som dominerer der. Først finner han en hvitbukhavørn, en fugl med ekstremt skarpe klør etterfulgt av en synanceia horrida, den giftigste fisken i verden. Til slutt tar Phil en nærmere titt på den beryktede piggrokken.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin drar til den australske savannen på jakt etter landets mest formidable skapninger. Først møter han Australias største rovfugl, en kilehaleørn, og Australias mest aggressive slange, kysttaipanen. Senere står han ansikt til ansikt med en krageagam og dens fascinerende forsvarsmekanismer.
